description: CompositionYellow round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, short sleeves, and graphic print across the front and partially spilling onto the sleevesFittingComfortWash care Hand wash cold Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Celebrate the wealth of old pottery found in South Carolina with this yellow cotton t-shirt from lee. The busy, distressed print across the front and partially on the sleeves enhances your style quotient. Team this with jeans and shorts for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
